title: Latest Chinese Electricity Production By Generation Type
section_path: Latest Chinese Electricity Production By Generation Type
section_path_text: Latest Chinese Electricity Production By Generation Type
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
China's total electricity generation came in at 768.5 billion kilowatt hours last month. This has marked a month-on-month increase of 50.6 billion kilowatt hours (7%) and is up year-on-year by 28.6 billion kilowatt hours (4%). Image reference: Chart 1 (1).jpg | assets/2024-07-29_xb8c3fza1py905d1dvhu6x77yxp9pk_img_chart128129_6fe996c56618.jpg
Coal-derived electricity generation totaled 487 billion kilowatt hours.
